skillSlots.name: Healing Feather
skillSlots.description: Heals 1 lowest-HP ally and 1 highest-ATK ally for 150% of Caster's ATK and applies [Dark Plume].

skillSlots.name: Darkwing Guardian
skillSlots.description: Heals all allies for 120% of Caster's ATK and applies [Dark Plume].

effects.name: Royal Guardian
effects.description: While Elbella survives, allies take 30% reduced DMG Over Time.

effects.name: Royal Guardian
effects.description: Ultimate additionally applies 2 stacks of [Dark Plume] to highest-ATK ally.

effects.name: Royal Guardian
effects.description: Ultimate additionally applies 1 stack of [Dark Plume] to lowest-HP ally.

effects.name: Royal Guardian
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Night Guardian] when [Dark Plume] reaches 4 stacks (each Hero can trigger this once per 2 turns).

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: When actively healing, dispels 1 Debuff from target and applies 1 stack of [Feather Blessing]: Each stack increases Healing Received by 4%; consumes 1 stack to block when receiving Debuffs (max 5 stacks).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: [Healing Feather] additionally applies 1 stack of [Feather Blessing] to target.

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: Apply 5 stacks of [Feather Blessing] to all allies at the start of battle

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: Each stack of [Feather Blessing] increases Carrier's Final DMG and Final DMG RED by 4%.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: Elbella's Skill Cooldowns -2; Ultimate additionally grants 1 stack of [Feather Blessing].
